# Messi beats Austria

As a kid I watched Maradonna dismatle Belgium in Mexico '86. I assume today's 10-year olds will think of Messi in the same way. 

The outcome was expected and the score was too. 4 of us had a draw -- among them Christian, who's lead is down to 44 points.
